user.title: Too Good To Go
user.description: Enter your Too Good To Go email address. A magic link will be sent to your inbox — no password needed.

link.title: Check your email
link.description:
A login link has been sent to **{email}**.

1. Open the email from Too Good To Go
2. Click the login link
3. Come back here and press **Submit**

options.title: Update interval
options.description: How often should Home Assistant check for available bags?

error.invalid_auth: Could not retrieve credentials. Make sure you clicked the link in the email before pressing Submit.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Too Good To Go. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.missing_dependency: The tgtg-python package is not installed. Restart Home Assistant and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Too Good To Go account is already configured.
